author: Jason Gross
message_subject: Update asm equiv to finish all but output goal

author: Jason Gross
message_subject: Don't go through nat for string comparison
message_body:
Also add modules for non-deprecated OrderedType version of string,
ascii.

See also https://github.com/coq/coq/pull/14096

author: Jason Gross
message_subject: Copy proof from Coq 8.12 std lib for older versions of Coq

author: jadep
message_subject: add TODO

author: Jason Gross
message_subject: Remove dependencies on the real numbers
message_body:
By copying over the implementation of nsatz, we can drop the
dependencies on the real axioms.  Together with
https://github.com/coq/coq/issues/12845, this should eliminate the last
axioms reported by coqchk, allowing us to be done with #736 (maybe
modulo adding a CI job to check that no axioms creep back in).

Not clear to me if this is worth it...

author: Jason Gross
message_subject: Add comments to WfReflective, handle Expr
message_body:
In addition to much better documentation in WfReflective, we now also have a
single tactic that handles goals of [Wf], on [Expr].

author: Jason Gross
message_subject: Add [Z.linear_solve_for], [Z.linear_substitute]
message_body:
The first solves for a variable; the second does this, and then runs
[subst].  By design, they only handle addition and subtraction.  They
should be easily generalizable to handle arbitrary rings (and should
probably be generalized to do so at some point).

(Also requested, if I recall correctly, by @andres-erbsen.)
